formName: Step 2 - Eligibility Step for  Water Licence Application
formDescription: This step has a set of questions/fields to determine if the applicant is eligible to apply for a water licence. Also there are other fields to  check whether the application is part of North Coast Transmission Line project, BC Hydro Sustainment Project, clean energy project or part of increasing the supply of housing units within British Columbia.

AnswerOnJob_eligible.title: Are you eligible to apply for a water licence?
AnswerOnJob_eligible.description: Applicant is eligible to apply if has ownership or entitled to possession a land or mine in British Columbia, OR  acting as an agent for a municipality, regional district, improvement district, development district, BC Hydro or water users' community OR  a holder of a certificate of public convenience and necessity issued under the Public Utilities Act

AnswerOnJob_housing.title: Is this application in relation to increasing the supply of housing units within British Columbia?
AnswerOnJob_housing.description: The purpose of this application must be specifically for development of houses or living units AND the development must increase the number of housing units on the land/property.

AnswerOnJob_north-coast-line.title: Is this application related to the North Coast Transmission Line?
AnswerOnJob_north-coast-line.description: The purpose of this application must be related with North Coast Transmission Line or pipeline project

AnswerOnJob_bc-hydro-sustainability.title: Is this application related to a BC Hydro Sustainment Project required for the maintenance and upgrading of existing electricity infrastructure, such as replacing aging equipment, improving transmission systems, or reinforcing substations to support long-term energy needs?
AnswerOnJob_bc-hydro-sustainability.description: The purpose of this application must be related with BC Hydro Sustainment Project

AnswerOnJob_clean-energy.title: Is this application related to a clean energy project that received a new Energy Purchase Agreement from BC Hydro between 2024-present?
AnswerOnJob_clean-energy.description: The purpose of this application must be related with clean energy project like wind or solar activities
